creator: lx@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

This patch does not correctly update the port -- plist changes are 
required for the port to uninstall and package correctly, and a new man 
page was added. Please test port updates before submitting. 

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-testing.html
